events.event_description: The American consulate at Asmara was raised to Embassy status with Joseph P. O'Neill as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim, establishing diplomatic relations.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on June 11, 1993, when the American consulate at Asmara was raised to Embassy status with Joseph P. O'Neill as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.
